flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 37% at Community College of Philadelphia vs the 2003–2007 baseline (11.3k vs 17.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Philadelphia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Community College of Philadelphia rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (16.5k → 18.2k).
